artifacts.summary: Analysis of JPL paper app:auto_existence and lem:history-time-shift-preservation for homogeneity. Finding: paper uses D=Z/Q directly, time-shift is translation in D (not automorphism of T). Three paths forward: discreteness axioms, axiomatic abstraction, or back-and-forth.

Rigorous back-and-forth analysis for homogeneity. Finding: homogeneity CANNOT be proven from existing construction due to Lindenbaum non-determinism. Must be DESIGNED into construction. Two paths: discreteness axioms (DP/DF → T≅Z, 100-200 lines) or controlled Lindenbaum (200-400 lines).
